latest.task:
Implement hello world web application using React and Node.js based on defined product requirements.

CONTEXT:
- MVP scope defined with 4 prioritized user stories
- P0: View Welcome Message (critical)
- P1: Interactive User Greeting (high priority)
- P1: Server Communication (high priority)
- P2: Application Health Status (nice to have)

CURRENT STATE:
- Product requirements documented and approved
- User stories include clear acceptance criteria
- Success metrics defined (page load < 3s, error-free execution)
- MVP focuses on basic functionality and client-server communication

NEXT STEPS:
1. Review complete product requirements above
2. Set up React frontend application structure
3. Implement Story 1 (Welcome Message) first
4. Implement Story 2 (Interactive Greeting)
5. Implement Story 3 (Server Communication) - coordinate with backend developer for API
6. Validate all acceptance criteria are met
7. Ensure code follows best practices and is properly documented

DELIVERABLES:
- Working React application meeting all P0 and P1 acceptance criteria
- Clean, maintainable code structure
- Basic documentation for running the application

Please proceed with frontend implementation.
